Our Equipment

BUILT TO
PERFORM

Professional-grade machines and free weights — everything you need to reach peak performance.

🏋️
Olympic Barbells & Plates
Competition-spec barbells with full plate sets up to 500kg capacity.
💺
Cable Machines
Dual-stack cable systems for full-range isolation and compound movements.
🚴
Cardio Zone
Treadmills, rowing machines, assault bikes, and stair climbers.
🔩
Power Racks
Heavy-duty squat racks with safety bars for safe heavy lifting.
🥊
Functional Training
Resistance bands, kettlebells, suspension trainers, and slam balls.
💆
Recovery Zone
Foam rollers, stretching mats, and massage tools for recovery.
⚡
HIIT & Plyo
Plyometric boxes, battle ropes, and agility ladders.
🪑
Machine Stations
Leg press, chest fly, lat pulldown, and 20+ isolation machines.
Head Trainer

ASHOK KUMAR
ROUT

IFBB Pro · Strength & Conditioning Coach

With over a decade of professional coaching experience, Ashok has transformed hundreds of bodies and mindsets. A former national-level powerlifter, he brings scientific precision and warrior mentality to every session — the programming that builds champions.

NSCA-CSCS IFBB Pro CPR/AED Nutrition Coach Kettlebell Certified
Book a Session
Achievements

A PROVEN
WINNER

Years of competing, coaching, and earning recognition on local and national stages.

2024
National Powerlifting Coach of the Year
Recognized by the National Strength Federation for consistent athlete development.
2023
Regional Open — 1st Place
Competed in Over-90kg, winning all three lifts with a combined total of 850kg.
2022
500+ Members Milestone
Fitness King reached 500 active members — built entirely through results and word of mouth.
2021
Best Gym — City Sports Awards
Voted best independent gym by the local sports federation and members' community.
2019
IFBB Pro Card Earned
Earned professional status at the National Qualifiers after a 10-year amateur career.
2013
Founded Fitness King Gym
Opened with a vision: a no-nonsense training environment built around real results.
